problem id: ea5def07
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(6) AND NOT SHR(4)) XOR NOT SHL(4)

examples:
  01111011 -> 10010111
  00001000 -> 01111101
  01110111 -> 01010111
  11000000 -> 11001111
  00001011 -> 10001101
  11010111 -> 01111111
  11010000 -> 11001111
  11001110 -> 10101100

query: 01010101
predicted answer: 11111111
